top_signals.title: Stocks Halt Selloff; Iran, Israel Exchange Missile Strikes | Bloomberg Brief 6/8/2026
top_signals.summary: US stocks stage a modest rebound after Friday's selloff. Oil climbs after Iran and Israel trade missile attacks. Sikander Rashid of Brookfield speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie at London Tech Week on the firm's investment in AI infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
